settings.heading: About us
settings.intro: A trusted electronics store built on honest advice and dependable products.

settings.content:
Emporx started with a simple idea: buying electronics should feel reassuring, not overwhelming. So we built a store around the products people actually rely on — phones, laptops, audio, smart home, wearables, monitors, and the accessories that tie it all together — and paired them with people who genuinely know the gear.

Based in Naples, Florida, we focus on the things that matter most to our customers: clear information, fair prices, secure checkout, and support that's there when you need it. [Optional: add your founding story and any milestones here.]

settings.title: Honest advice
settings.text: We recommend what fits your needs — not just the priciest option.

settings.title: Products we trust
settings.text: We stock dependable tech and stand behind what we sell.

settings.title: Support that shows up
settings.text: Reach real specialists before and after your purchase.

settings.heading: Ready to shop?
settings.content: Explore our full range or talk to our team about the right setup for you.
